contact.description: If you're interested in the product, or want to learn more feel free to contact us for a demo. If you want to know if the product is for you then we will start by doing a detailed calculation of which hardware solution fits with your energy setup at home.

hero.title: About us.
hero.subtitle: We are dedicated to providing cutting-edge solutions for energy storage using hydrogen technology.

mission.label: Our mission
mission.title: Replacing fossil fuels with local green hydrogen.
mission.body: It is our mission to use the abundance of green energy to replace fossil fuels wherever they are used. We always produce the hydrogen locally, at your home or business, so you are in control of your own energy supply.
mission.body2: Renewable energy sources like wind power and solar are increasing rapidly, but to balance the energy grid and secure a stable power supply, the world is still counting on fossil fuel as an energy source. A year-round stable power supply without fossil fuels can only be achieved with local energy storage — and that's exactly what we deliver.

news.label: NEWS
news.title: What we have been up to.

card1.label: NEWS
card1.title: We attended Vakbeurs Energie
card1.body: We had a great time at Vakbeurs Energie, where we gave daily talks on becoming self-sufficient with hydrogen storage. We also discussed the business case for long-term storage and how it differs from battery storage.

card2.label: NEWS
card2.title: Tank hydrogen at SAIL Amsterdam
card2.body: SAIL Amsterdam is one of the biggest maritime events in the world, with more than 10.000 boats, and 2.3 million visitors a day. We are proud to power their fleet of hydrogen boats.

card3.label: NEWS
card3.title: Erik Blaauw pioneers with hydrogen system
card3.body: Our customer Erik Blaauw from Lelystad is the first to produce green hydrogen in the province of Flevoland. The NOS, Omroep Flevoland and Waterstof Magazine wrote about the opening event.

card4.label: NEWS
card4.title: Power2You gets grant
card4.body: We are proud to announce that we have been awarded a European grant through the EFRO programme Kansen voor West III for our innovation program Power2You. This contribution enables us to grow and continue investing in technical innovation.

card5.label: NEWS
card5.title: Hydrogen Innovation Award 2024
card5.body: Hermanos Energy has been recognised for an innovative hydrogen solution designed for local energy storage, catering to homes, farmers, and small businesses.

hero.label: about us
hero.title: Pioneering the hydrogen revolution.
hero.subtitle: We are at the forefront of the energy revolution, committed to delivering sustainable and efficient energy solutions through hydrogen-based energy storage.

story.label: OUR STORY
story.title: The energy transition is in full swing.
story.p1: It is no longer a question of if and when; it is happening now, and the only question is how fast we can go.
story.p2: The new green era comes with its own challenges. There is plenty of solar and wind power, so much so that it's sometimes scaled down, but we still depend on fossil fuels for nights and winters. It is our mission to overcome that challenge. We strive towards a world where the energy from the summer sun is harnessed, storing its warmth to keep your home cozy during winter's cold and lighting your rooms when darkness falls.
story.p3: Hermanos Energy was born from the shared vision of two brothers, fuelled not only by the pursuit of green energy but also by the power of brotherhood. Our dreams extend beyond a shift in energy sources. We envision a future where energy is shared among brothers, friends, and neighbours, a future where multinationals and foreign regimes hold no sway, for this precious resource belongs to all of us. We firmly believe that the energy transition should be driven by local initiatives, empowering communities and benefiting the many, rather than serving the interests of the few.
story.p4: Just as farmers have long tended to their fields, nurturing crops throughout summer and reaping the harvest for the winter to come, Hermanos Energy seeks to apply this age-old principle to our modern world. By utilising innovative techniques, we strive to forge a future that meets our evolving needs.

efro.label: Co-financed by the European Union
efro.title: Power2You
efro.body: We are proud to announce that we have been awarded a European grant through the EFRO programme Kansen voor West III for our innovation program Power2You. This contribution enables us as a company to grow and ensures that we can continue to invest time and energy into technical innovation over the next two years. It is also a valuable recognition of the social impact we are making.
efro.goals_intro: The Power2You program runs for two years, from May 2025 to May 2027, and has the following goals:
efro.g1: Introducing Power2Drive and Power2Heat to the market, expanding our product range and enabling the use of green energy in sectors that are difficult to decarbonize through other methods.
efro.g2: Reducing the total cost of our product portfolio by investigating alternative electrolyzer and fuel cell stacks. And simplifying the product to reduce maintenance cost.
efro.g3: Improving the overall energy efficiency of the system by developing an efficient heat recovery solution.
efro.g4: Enhancing our smart algorithms and energy consumption forecasting to increase revenue for our customers.

mission.label: Our mission
mission.body: Hermanos Energy mission is to enable local users to be a full year in control of their green stable energy supply. In a world where local users have always green energy, there is no need and no place for fossil fuels.

hero.title: One vision. Three products.
hero.subtitle: It is our mission to use the abundance of green energy to replace fossil fuels wherever they are used. We always produce the hydrogen locally, at your home or business.

intro.label: The system
intro.title: Green hydrogen, produced locally.
intro.body: On windy and sunny periods during the day the green energy supply exceeds the demand, which is leading to very low prices, and sometimes even free electricity. Green energy is cheap energy!
intro.body2: With the energy storage of Hermanos Energy you can benefit from the daily and seasonal price difference and contribute to net zero at the same time.

three.title: Choose your application.
three.subtitle: Depending on your energy needs, our hydrogen storage system can be configured for heating, electricity, or mobility.

heat.title: Power to Heat
heat.body: Using your summer sun to heat in the winter, with power to heat.

power.title: Power to Power
power.body: All year round green electricity with power to power.

drive.title: Power to Drive
drive.body: Driving a vehicle on hydrogen. With power to drive.

ems.label: Our OWN EMS
ems.title: The software behind it all.
ems.body: Green energy is all about timing, we make hydrogen when there is an abundance of green cheap electricity, and use it when you need it most, our software takes care of that.
ems.bullet1: Makes predictions based on your historical data, and the weather
ems.bullet2: Live connected to your solar panels and consumption.
ems.bullet3: Can scale up and down in milliseconds
ems.bullet4: Picks the right moments based on day ahead prices

hero.label: Product
hero.title: Seamless energy solutions, tailored to you

intro.label: The system
intro.title: Green hydrogen, produced locally.
intro.body: The production of green electricity is rapidly increasing, but the yield is variable. Therefore, the bottleneck is no longer production but rather the storage of electricity. To create a buffer that balances production and consumption, storage is crucial.
intro.body2: We create and store hydrogen locally. Our software monitors grid prices, as well as your own energy consumption and electricity production. This allows you to optimize the use of your green electricity by converting it to hydrogen during peak production times.
intro.body3: We often produce hydrogen when energy is free or when electricity prices are negative. That's why our hydrogen is always green and very affordable. You can use it as a replacement for natural gas in any heating application, as fuel for a vehicle, or store it and convert it back into electricity when needed.

product_page.notice: Due to high demand, we are working with building slots. We are fully booked for 2025, contact us to discuss possibilities for 2026 and to reserve a slot.

features.title: Key features.
features.f7: Driving a vehicle on your own hydrogen
features.f15: Can replace or be mixed with gas

faq.title: Frequently asked questions.
faq.q1: Is converting electricity into hydrogen an efficient process?
faq.a1: Often this is seen as an inefficient process, but the 'loss' of energy is mostly heat. In our system this heat is recovered and used.
faq.q2: Can I use the hydrogen to replace my natural gas needs?
faq.q3: Is hydrogen storage a safe solution?
faq.q4: Is storing energy with hydrogen better than a battery?

cta.label: Book a demo, or ask for custom energy advice
cta.title: Get in touch.

intro.body: Hydrogen is a gas with characteristics very similar to natural gas. With Power-to-Heat, we burn the hydrogen directly replacing your need for conventional gas.

detail.body: During summer, solar panels generate more energy than you consume. At these moments, we convert the excess electricity into hydrogen and store it in tanks for later use. The system includes a battery that balances your electricity usage throughout the day, ensuring only the surplus energy is converted into hydrogen while also extending the electrolyzer's operating hours. While generating hydrogen, some heat is released and recovered. This heat can be used for hot water — typically enough to provide showers for a family.

f2.title: Mixing with gas
f2.body: Hydrogen is so similar to natural gas that it can be mixed with it, allowing you to start using hydrogen without needing to switch over completely right away.

f3.title: Hardly any energy loss
f3.body: When converting between electricity and hydrogen, heat is released. This heat is often considered 'energy loss.' In our system, however, the released heat is recovered and stored — resulting in less than 15% energy loss and making the entire process highly efficient.

action.title: Power to heat in action
action.body: In summer, there is often an excess of solar power, while energy consumption is relatively low. In winter, days are shorter and temperatures lower — most energy use then goes toward heating. With power to heat, we convert electricity from solar panels into hydrogen, which can be stored and used for heating in winter.

unique.title: This is what makes power to heat unique.
unique.body: Throughout the year, the software continuously monitors grid prices, the availability of green energy, weather forecasts, and your specific circumstances. It uses this information to optimize the system's performance for your needs — making sure you can store the surplus solar energy generated in summer and use it for heating in winter.

intro.body: In summer there is an excess of solar power and at that time energy consumption is low. In winter the yield of solar panels is much less, and a lot of energy in the form of heating is used. Batteries have a limited storage capacity — they are great for day storage but we add hydrogen storage to handle the imbalance between seasons.

detail.body: During summer, solar panels often generate more energy than you consume. At these moments, we store the surplus energy in a battery for later use. Additionally, we convert the excess electricity into hydrogen, which can be used for heating your home during the winter months. Even if you don't have solar panels, you can still benefit from the green energy available on the grid.

f1.title: Day and night storage
f1.body: We store your electricity in a battery as a buffer for short-term imbalances between production and usage, such as day-night variations.

f2.title: Seasonal storage
f2.body: We use an electrolyzer to store electricity in the form of hydrogen as a buffer for imbalances over longer periods (summer–winter). A fuel cell converts it back to electricity. Hydrogen is 20 times cheaper than regular batteries per stored kWh.

f3.title: Managing heat
f3.body: When converting between electricity and hydrogen, heat is released. This heat is often considered 'energy loss.' In our system, the released heat is recovered and stored to deliver hot water at around 55 °C to your home or business.

unique.title: This is what makes power to power unique.
unique.body: Throughout the year, the software continuously monitors grid prices, availability of green energy, weather predictions, and your specific circumstances. It leverages these inputs to optimize the system's performance for your needs.

hero.title: Power to Drive
hero.subtitle: Drive a boat or vehicle on your own hydrogen.

intro.body: Diesel-powered vehicles are not welcome in zero-emission zones like nature reserves. Battery-powered vehicles are often not feasible either, as their weight can cause them to sink in muddy terrain. In these cases, hydrogen-powered vehicles are the only practical option — and they also offer a much greater range.

detail.body: During a sunny summer day, energy is cheap and green — but that's often the exact moment you want to use your vehicle. We produce hydrogen when there's an abundance of green energy and store it in tanks, so you can refuel later. Whether you have a vehicle you use daily or only during certain seasons, we always choose the right moments throughout the year to produce hydrogen ensuring it's available when you need it.

f2.title: Easy refueling
f2.body: The hydrogen used to fuel your vehicle is produced on-site, so you don't depend on external fuel suppliers, and your vehicle doesn't need to leave the premises to refuel. Our software monitors grid prices, the availability of renewable energy, and the amount of fuel left in your tanks — it not only ensures you always have fuel but also chooses the most cost-effective moments to produce it.

f3.title: More than just fuel
f3.body: During hydrogen production, we recover waste heat and use a battery to extend the electrolyzer's runtime.

action.title: Power to drive in action
action.body: While you're out working during the day and using your vehicle, the electrolyzer produces hydrogen using the energy generated by your solar panels. By the time you return from a hard day's work, your hydrogen tanks are full and ready to use.

unique.title: This is what makes power to drive unique.
unique.body: The hydrogen used to fuel your vehicle is produced on-site, so you don't depend on external fuel suppliers, and your vehicle doesn't need to leave the premises to refuel. Our software monitors grid prices, the availability of renewable energy, and the amount of fuel left in your tanks — ensuring you always have fuel at the most cost-effective moments.

action.label: Power to heat in action
action.title: Store summer energy. Use it in winter.
action.body: In summer, your solar panels produce more electricity than you can use or store in a battery. With Power to Heat, that surplus electricity is converted into hydrogen using an electrolyser. The hydrogen is stored locally and, when winter comes, used directly as a clean fuel for heating — no fossil fuels required, no dependency on the grid.
